consistency.type_declaration: Consistent. 'Weapon (any sword)' matches general expectations for magic items.

quality.formatting: Good. Data fields are clearly defined.
quality.completeness: High. Contains slug, name, type, rarity, attunement requirement, description, and source context.
quality.clarity: High. The mechanical effect is straightforward (crits deal extra damage and grant temp HP).

mechanics.trigger: On a natural 20 attack roll (a critical hit).

effect.limitation: Does not affect constructs or undead.

effect.condition: Extra damage dealt from this effect
effect.result: User gains temporary hit points equal to the extra damage dealt.

mechanics.balance_assessment: Appropriate for Rare. The effect is conditional (only on a crit) but the combination of extra damage and immediate healing (temp HP) is strong when triggered.

analysis.archival_notes: The RAW DATA perfectly maps to standard D&D 5e item formatting. No structural or mechanical inconsistencies were found. The 'source_type_rarity' field appears to be a meta-data field consolidating other attributes.
